entries.definition: The ley network is the city's shared magical energy system.
entries.why_it_matters: It fills the same systems role that a grid or other core operating capacity would in another scenario.

entries.definition: Ward towers regulate and route civic magic across the city.
entries.why_it_matters: If they weaken, multiple services can fail together.

background_notes: This pack exists mainly to prove that canonical systems can render through magical mechanism language without changing engine logic.
